governance_comment: Critical-modules list is GOVERNED in ADR-0016 (docs/adr/0016-testing-your-tests.md) — adding a module is an ADR, removing requires a retrospective.
break_comment: problem.ts is RFC 7807 envelope CONSTRUCTION — much of it is literal slug/title/detail/next_actions data passed to makeProblem, so a large share of mutants are low-value string edits the handler tests do not (and need not) assert. The break is a ratcheting FLOOR over the current behavioural-coverage baseline, not a 100% target; raise it as detail assertions are added. The behavioural logic (clientFaultStatus 4xx/5xx routing, status/header mapping) is covered.
